inline_comments.message: can you please also add out.close in the finally block above. that got missed.
please close the out stream and also in the in stream  in the finally block. if not it leads to data leaks
same here please close the readers

Hi, 
using try-with-resources construct ensures that the resource is closed. closing this in finally block is not necessary. 
Please see the link below for more information:

Below link provides more details: 
https://wiki.sei.cmu.edu/confluence/display/java/ERR54-J.+Use+a+try-with-resources+statement+to+safely+handle+closeable+resources

Sonar flagged this issue: 
https://sonar.onap.org/issues?myIssues=true&open=AV_om8Wl-08if2a6uf0K&projectUuids=AV8LJxI3uDqGnRl2bdaB&resolved=false&rules=squid%3AS2093&severities=MAJOR
